```r
#Table 

crime_summary <- crime %>%
  count(crime_type, sort = TRUE) %>%
  top_n(10)

print(crime_summary)

#Plot 

ggplot(crime_summary, aes(x = reorder(crime_type, n), y = n, fill = crime_type)) +
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(title = \Top 10 Most Common Crimes in Surrey February 2024\"
